title: Precise Manipulation with Efficient Online RL
paperLabel: Efficient Online RL for Precision Tasks
summary: We extract an RL token from VLA models to enable fast online RL and improve throughput on precise tasks with only a few hours of data.
body: This work studies how to adapt large policies with constrained online interaction budgets.
By exposing a compact RL token interface, we significantly reduce optimization instability during on-robot finetuning.
The approach reaches high-precision assembly behavior with small amounts of additional data.
figureAlt: Precise Manipulation with Efficient Online RL figure
